formulas.latex: \begin{matrix} & & \left\|\underset{a \in A}{\sum} \underset{\left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \in U^{'} \left(j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}\right)}{\sum} y_{a} \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) + s_{j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}} - 1\right\|_{2}^{2} \\ & & = \left\|\underset{\left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \in U^{'} \left(j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}\right)}{\sum} y_{a} \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) + n_{a} + s_{j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}} - 1\right\|_{2}^{2} \\ & & = \left[\underset{\left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \in U^{'} \left(j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}\right)}{\sum} y_{a} \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right)\right]^{2} + 2 \underset{\left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \in U^{'} \left(j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}\right)}{\sum} y_{a} \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \left(n_{a} + s_{j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}} - 1\right) + \left(n_{a} + s_{j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}} - 1\right)^{2} \\ & & = \underset{\left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \in U^{'} \left(j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}\right)}{\sum} y_{a} \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) + 2 \underset{\left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \in U^{'} \left(j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}\right)}{\sum} y_{a} \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \left(n_{a} + s_{j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}} - 1\right) + \left(n_{a} + s_{j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}} - 1\right)^{2} \\ & & = \underset{\left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \in U^{'} \left(j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}\right)}{\sum} y_{a} \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \left(2 n_{a} + 2 s_{j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}} - 1\right) + \left(n_{a} + s_{j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}} - 1\right)^{2}\end{matrix}

formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}Z_{4}^{a} & = & \underset{\left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \in E_{a}^{^{''}}}{\sum} c_{a} \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \cdot y_{a} \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) + \underset{\left(j , j^{'}\right) \in E}{\sum} \underset{\tau^{''} \in T_{e}}{\sum} \lambda_{j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}} \left[\underset{\left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \in U^{'} \left(j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}\right)}{\sum} y_{a} \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) - 1\right] \\ & & + \frac{\rho}{2} \underset{\left(j , j^{'}\right) \in E}{\sum} \underset{\tau^{''} \in T_{e}}{\sum} \left[\underset{\left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \in U^{'} \left(j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}\right)}{\sum} y_{a} \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \left(2 n_{a} - 1\right) + \left(n_{a} - 1\right)^{2}\right] \\ & = & \underset{\left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \in E_{a}^{^{''}}}{\sum} c_{a} \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \cdot y_{a} \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) + \underset{\left(j , j^{'}\right) \in E}{\sum} \underset{\tau^{''} \in T_{e}}{\sum} \underset{\left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \in U^{'} \left(j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}\right)}{\sum} y_{a} \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \left[\lambda_{j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}} + \frac{\rho}{2} \left(2 n_{a} - 1\right)\right] \\ & & + \frac{\rho}{2} \underset{\left(j , j^{'}\right) \in E}{\sum} \underset{\tau^{''} \in T_{e}}{\sum} \left(n_{a} - 1\right)^{2} - \underset{\left(j , j^{'}\right) \in E}{\sum} \underset{\tau^{''} \in T_{e}}{\sum} \lambda_{j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}} \\ & = & \underset{\left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \in E_{a}^{^{''}}}{\sum} \gamma_{a}^{'} \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \cdot y_{a} \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) + \frac{\rho}{2} \underset{\left(j , j^{'}\right) \in E}{\sum} \underset{\tau^{''} \in T_{e}}{\sum} \left(n_{a} - 1\right)^{2} - \underset{\left(j , j^{'}\right) \in E}{\sum} \underset{\tau^{''} \in T_{e}}{\sum} \lambda_{j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}}\end{aligned}

formulas.label: eqn0028
formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}\gamma_{a}^{'} \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) & = & \begin{cases} c_{a} \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) + \underset{\left(j , j^{'}\right) \in E}{\sum} \underset{\tau^{''} \in T_{e} : \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \in U^{'} \left(j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}\right)}{\sum} \left[\lambda_{j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}} + \frac{\rho}{2} \left(2 n_{a} - 1\right)\right] & n_{a} \geq 1 \\ c_{a} \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) + \underset{\left(j , j^{'}\right) \in E}{\sum} \underset{\tau^{''} \in T_{e} : \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \in U^{'} \left(j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}\right)}{\sum} \lambda_{j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}} & n_{a} = 0 \end{cases} , \forall \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \in E_{a}^{^{''}} \\ & = & c_{a} \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) + \underset{\left(j , j^{'}\right) \in E}{\sum} \underset{\tau^{''} \in T_{e} : \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \in U^{'} \left(j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}\right)}{\sum} \left\{\lambda_{j , j^{'} , \tau^{''}} + \text{max} \left\{0 , \frac{\rho}{2} \left(2 n_{a} - 1\right)\right\}\right\} , \forall \left(i , i^{'} , \tau , \tau^{'}\right) \in E_{a}^{^{''}}\end{aligned}

                                 <mml:mo>=</mml:mo>
                                 <mml:mi>arg</mml:mi>
                                 <mml:msub>
                                    <mml:mi>min</mml:mi>
                                    <mml:mi>z</mml:mi>
                                 </mml:msub>
                                 <mml:mspace width="0.16em"/>
                                 <mml:msub>
                                    <mml:mi>L</mml:mi>
                                    <mml:mi>ρ</mml:mi>
                                 </mml:msub>
                                 <mml:mrow>
                                    <mml:mo stretchy="true">(</mml:mo>
                                    <mml:mrow>
                                       <mml:msup>
                                          <mml:mrow>
                                             <mml:mi>x</mml:mi>
                                          </mml:mrow>
                                          <mml:mrow>
                                             <mml:mi>k</mml:mi>
                                             <mml:mo>+</mml:mo>
                                             <mml:mn>1</mml:mn>
                                          </mml:mrow>
                                       </mml:msup>
                                       <mml:mo>,</mml:mo>
                                       <mml:msup>
                                          <mml:mrow>
                                             <mml:mi>y</mml:mi>
                                          </mml:mrow>
                                          <mml:mrow>
                                             <mml:mi>k</mml:mi>
                                             <mml:mo>+</mml:mo>
                                             <mml:mn>1</mml:mn>
                                          </mml:mrow>
                                       </mml:msup>
                                       <mml:mo>,</mml:mo>
                                       <mml:mi>z</mml:mi>
                                       <mml:mo>,</mml:mo>
                                       <mml:msup>
                                          <mml:mi>λ</mml:mi>
                                          <mml:mi>k</mml:mi>
                                       </mml:msup>
                                    </mml:mrow>
                                    <mml:mo stretchy="true">)</mml:mo>
                                 </mml:mrow>
                              </mml:mrow>
                           </mml:math>

formulas.label: eqn0053
